segments.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video.

Timeline:
0-3s: Show a real-life wrong or inefficient behavior using close-up details to amplify the pain point. A person lifts an overstuffed cardboard box full of books and clothes. The bottom seam of the box splits open in slow motion — books, folded clothes, and belongings crash and scatter across the living room floor. Close-up of the torn cardboard edge and the messy pile.

3-6s: Quickly introduce the product as the direct solution and show the issue being fixed immediately. A bright royal blue CasaBella 24-gallon heavy-duty moving bag appears beside the mess. The wide dual-zipper top opens fully, and hands rapidly load all the scattered items into the bag. The bag is lifted easily by its wide blue wraparound carrying handles — sturdy, no tearing, no struggle.

6-10s: Fast-cut scene 1 showing the first clear result. A person confidently carries the fully loaded CasaBella bag by its wraparound handles through a bright hallway. The bag holds its rectangular shape, handles stay strong, contents secure. The glossy blue woven PE waterproof material catches the light.

Do not start with a perfect product shot.
Do not end with a CTA in this segment.
Keep the pacing fast, clear, and product-focused.

Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity.
Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure.
Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.
Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.
Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.
segments.negative_prompt: No product color change. No shape distortion. No extra accessories, buttons, zippers, straps, lights, or packaging. No text, no logos, no watermarks. No cartoon, no 3D render, no illustration style. No slow cinematic pacing. No perfect pristine studio setup. No talking head. No influencer persona.

segments.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style ad video.

Timeline:
0-4s: Fast-cut scene 2 in a different real-life usage environment. An outdoor camping scene on green grass — sleeping bags, tent poles, and camping gear are being loaded into the bright royal blue CasaBella bag. The wide dual-zipper top is fully open, revealing the silver striped interior lining. Hands place gear inside easily, the bag sits stable on the ground.

4-8s: Fast-cut scene 3 showing final result, comfort, cleanliness, or improved usage. Three neatly labeled CasaBella bags are folded flat and stored on a clean closet shelf. Each white tag pocket is visible with its identification card. The space is organized, tidy, and clutter-free. Soft natural light.

8-10s: Short CTA. 'Move smarter. Store better.' appears as clean white text overlay. The blue CasaBella bag remains subtly visible in the frame.

This segment should feel like the continuation of the previous 10-second segment.
Keep the same product identity, visual style, pacing, and usage logic.

Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity.
Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure.
Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.
Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.
Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.
segments.negative_prompt: No product color change. No shape distortion. No extra accessories, buttons, zippers, straps, lights, or packaging. No text except the CTA overlay text. No logos, no watermarks. No cartoon, no 3D render, no illustration style. No slow cinematic pacing. No talking head. No influencer persona.
